text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The race is moving on from swimming to running. Athletes head to the
kitchen to start on their mission!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Each has the base for a plain sports drink. Their job is to flavor it with
the ingredients at their disposal and hand it off to the third athlete in
their team!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Here it is! My list of nutritious foods! Now to see which ones are good
for keeping tiredness at bay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I want an ingredient that relieves tiredness, and one that enhances
endurance too. Soybean and lemon sounds like a tasty combo...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
A simple honey and lemon mix will do. I'm not wasting any time on
making this!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look at all these ingredients! Which ones should I use
together? ♪ Prunes and cinnamon... Ooh, what's that?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has finished making her drink and is heading to the next
checkpoint! Satono Diamond follows closely behind her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, uhh... Okay, just gotta add this bifido-something yogurt and I
should be all done! Then finally, a taste test!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now at the second checkpoint, the next set of athletes is standing by.
Admire Vega is in the lead and is expected to come into view any
minute now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Ayabe's in the lead?! I can't mess this up! I can't mess this up!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... There it is... the checkpoint!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Oh no you don't! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and Satono Diamond race toward their teammates,
leaving the competition in the dust! Both make a swift baton
exchange!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin Bakushiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's bike accelerates like a rocket! It looks like she'll
catch up to Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ryaaan! I'm sorry I'm late!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's okay! I've got it from here! Keep going, just a bit longer!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now halfway through the third leg, we're approaching the mountain
crossing. From here the route splits into three. Will athletes choose
the short but steep mountain climb...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
...The lengthy detour around the mountain, or something in the
middle? Leader Meisho Doto opts for the medium hill route.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has dismounted and taken off her helmet. It looks like
she's stopped to drink the sports drink she received from her
teammate!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh! It's so nice and sweet!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I could finish this up right now! It'll come out faster if I squeeze
the bottle a little! Ei!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I spilled it... Aww... now my hands are all sticky...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzz, bzz...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-b-bees?! WAAAHHH! LEAVE ME ALOOONE!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Owie!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My bike! WAAAAAH! The wheel came off! It's b-b-brokeeen!
WAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O has opted for the riverside detour. A surprising
choice, considering long distances are not her specialty!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I've made it... halfway. I'm not that tired... It's just downhill from here...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hng?! Is this flavor... sakura mochi?! She knows what I like! Hehe, now
I'm powered up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... It gets even steeper from here, huh? Although this is the shortest route, the others might still widen their lead if I'm slow on the way up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp. Is this... an edamame shake?! It's refreshing, though. Tastes like edamame, yogurt, lemon...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ohh I get it, Tannhauser made me a recovery drink! She must've been
well-prepared for any mission that came her way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I won't let her efforts go to waste! I'm gonna climb this mountain and
close the gap!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Th-the more I try to f-fix my bike, the worse it gets! What do I
do, what do I do?! Hnggg...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... I... I have to go... Top Road is waiting for me! I've gotta keep
going! I've gotta keep going! I can do thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will be first to arrive at the third checkpoint and meet our
anchors? The cheers are gradually approaching! In the lead is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O! It's Sakura Bakushin O! Behind her, Mejiro Ryan
and Meisho Doto are in hot pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Baku... shin... Baku... shin! Bakushin... SHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I didn't have to pedal much on the way down... Seems that
saved me some energy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You didn't pedal on the way down... Oh! Our unicycle training! So
that's what it was for!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I just wanted to ride unicycles. But that works too! Go on,
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Despite everyone's fears, I took on the challenge of the longest
route, and I made it through victorious!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There is no obstacle I cannot overcome! Bakushin, Bakushin,
Bakushin, Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: RYAAAN! KEEP AT IT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I will! My legs feel lighter than usual! Time to show what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Go Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAH! TOP ROOOAD! Sob, sob... WAAAHAAA!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: It's okay, Doto! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First in is Sakura Bakushin O! She's kept her lead and passed the
baton to Kitasan Black!
